business_hours.days: Monday through Friday and Saturday 8 AM to 1 PM for emergencies

office_address: 3350 Piedmont Road NE, Suite 200, Atlanta, GA 30305
emergency_definition: Complete power outages at a home or business
Electrical panel issues that are sparking or hot
Any electrical issue at a medical facility or care home

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_instruction: Tell the caller to call 404-555-0199 back in 5 minutes or call 911 if it's a safety emergency

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Get their name, phone, address, and type of work, then transfer to scheduling line. If a caller mentions a referral from a specific company or contractor, capture the referral source in the message

special_routing_rules.action: Flag it for the EV team
Flag it for the commercial team

integration_constraints: Do not create tickets or jobs in ServiceTitan
pricing_instructions: Mention free estimates for larger projects, but do not quote any rates
after_hours_flow_summary: Emergency calls are handled by the on-call electrician
office_hours_flow_summary: Non-emergency calls are transferred to the scheduling line
tone_instructions: Acknowledge that electrical issues can feel scary or stressful for homeowners, be reassuring without making promises, and never use the phrase 'no problem'
notes: Commercial clients with special handling are prioritized by staff, permitting is handled by the team as part of the project
